---
title: "About"
toc: false
---

## **Education**

::: {.callout-tip icon="false"}
## [{{< fa building-columns size=1.5x >}}]{style="color:blue"} Sep. 2019 - Present, University of Connecticut, Ph.D Student in Statistics. 

[{{< fa user size=1.5x >}}]{style="color:blue"} Advisor : [Victor Hugo Lachos](https://hlachos.stat.uconn.edu/)

[{{< fa check size=1x >}}]{style="color:blue"} an academic leave of absence - May. 2021 \~ Aug. 2023
:::

::: {.callout-tip icon="false"}
## [{{< fa graduation-cap size=1.5x >}}]{style="color:crimson"} Mar. 2015 - Feb. 2017, Korea University, M.S. in Statistics.

[{{< fa user size=1.5x >}}]{style="color:crimson"} Advisor : [Yousung Park](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Yousung-Park)

[{{< fa check size=1x >}}]{style="color:crimson"} Thesis : A study on financial stability through the estimation of child education and childcare budget, workers' compensation insurance, and employment insurance [{{< fa download size=1.5x >}}](http://www.riss.kr/link?id=T14435637)
:::

::: {.callout-tip icon="false"}
## [{{< fa graduation-cap size=1.5x >}}]{style="color:red"} Mar. 2010 - Feb. 2015, Sejong University, B.S. in Statistics.

[{{< fa user size=1.5x >}}]{style="color:red"} Advisor : [Seungyeon Lee](http://dasan.sejong.ac.kr/~leesy/)
:::

## **Technical Skills**

-   Advance programming skills of R, SAS, Python and SQL

-   Advance technical skills of SPSS statistics and SPSS modeler

-   Moderate programming skills in HTML, C, JAVA

## **Certificates**

-   SAS Certified Base/Advanced Programmer for SAS 9, JUL 2015

-   Oracle Database 10g Administrator Certified Professional, SEP 2014

-   Oracle Database 12c Administrator Certified Professional, JAN 2016

## **Awards and Honors**

-   Scholarships for Internationalization, Korea Univ. Spring 2016

-   Academic Research Scholarships, Korea Univ. Spring 2016, Fall 2015

-   BK21PLUS Scholarships, Korea Univ. Spring 2016, Fall 2015

-   Magna cum Laude, Sejong Univ. Spring 2015

-   Honors Scholarships, Sejong Univ. 2014, 2013, 2012, 2011

## **Teaching Assistant**

-   Introduction to Mathematical Statistics 2, UConn. Spring 2021

-   Introduction to Mathematical Statistics 1, UConn. Fall 2020

-   Bayesian Statistics, Sejong Univ. Fall 2018

-   Introduction to Database(mySQL), Korea Univ. Fall 2015

-   Introduction to C-Programming, Korea Univ. Spring 2015

-   Mathematical Statistics 2, Sejong Univ. Fall 2014
